title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - Tsuzumi Mansion Arc
original_title: 鬼滅の刃 鼓屋敷編
overview: Tanjiro ventures to the south-southeast where he encounters a cowardly young man named Zenitsu Agatsuma, a fellow survivor from Final Selection. His sparrow asks Tanjiro to help keep him in line. A recap of Kimetsu no Yaiba episodes 11–14, with new footage and special end credits.
